Close-up overhead shot of a wooden warehouse table surface showing two plain cotton round-neck t-shirts laid flat side by side, one pure bright white t-shirt on the left and one off-white cream-toned t-shirt on the right, natural daylight from window creating clear color contrast, Indian man's hands entering frame and placing both shirts carefully next to each other for comparison, realistic textile texture visible, 9:16 vertical format.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding up a pure white cotton t-shirt against a bright window with natural sunlight streaming through, fabric glowing with bright white luminosity, then hands switching to hold an off-white t-shirt against the same sunlight showing the warm cream undertone difference, camera slightly tilts to emphasize the color contrast, realistic indoor lighting transition, 9:16 vertical format.

Medium angle shot of a clean wooden workspace table surface showing a plain white t-shirt and an off-white t-shirt laid flat next to each other under a bright LED desk lamp, Indian man's hands entering frame holding a color swatch card and placing it between both t-shirts to show color code comparison, camera slowly dollies down from above to table level, warm professional lighting, realistic printing business workspace, 9:16 vertical format.

Close-up shot of Indian businessman's hands folding a perfectly bright white cotton round-neck t-shirt on a wooden warehouse table, fabric showing clean pure white color with no undertones, soft satisfied hand movements suggesting correct choice made, neatly stacked white t-shirts visible in soft background, warm indoor lighting creating professional quality feel, camera slowly pulls back slightly, 9:16 vertical format.

topic: Client bola tshirt ka weight kam lag raha hai — GSM aur weight mein fark hai
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a smartphone to his ear with a concerned expression suggested by hand gestures, other hand holding a plain white oversized cotton t-shirt on a wooden warehouse desk, warm overhead lighting, camera slowly pushes in, 9:16 vertical format, realistic textile business environment

Medium overhead shot of a clean wooden table surface showing two plain white cotton round-neck t-shirts laid flat side by side, one regular fit M-size and one oversized XL-size, both clearly visible with different dimensions, bright natural daylight from window, camera static, 9:16 vertical format, crisp product comparison setup

Close-up shot of Indian businessman's hands holding a small digital weighing scale displaying numbers, placing a neatly folded plain white oversized cotton t-shirt onto the scale platform, warm indoor warehouse lighting, camera slightly tilted downward, 9:16 vertical format, realistic measurement demonstration scene

Medium angle shot of Indian man's hands stretching out a plain white oversized cotton t-shirt horizontally to show the loose fit and fabric spread, holding it against a neutral grey wall background, fingers gripping the shoulder seams, soft even lighting, camera slowly zooms in, 9:16 vertical format, demonstrating fabric area difference

Close-up overhead shot of a wooden workspace table showing a neatly stacked pile of premium white cotton oversized t-shirts with visible thick fabric texture, one t-shirt slightly pulled to side showing the smooth bio-washed finish, warm golden hour lighting from side window, camera slow dolly right, 9:16 vertical format, satisfying quality product reveal

topic: Client ne acid wash pe embroidery karwai — thread toota kyu? Texture issue
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a light grey acid wash cotton t-shirt, running fingers across the uneven textured surface showing the irregular washed pattern, indoor workshop lighting with embroidery machines visible in soft background blur, camera slowly pushes in to emphasize the rough texture, vertical 9:16 frame, realistic textile workspace environment

Medium overhead shot of a clean work table surface showing an acid wash t-shirt laid flat next to a regular plain white t-shirt for comparison, Indian worker's hands entering frame to touch both fabrics showing the texture difference, warm workshop lighting, embroidery thread spools visible at the edge of frame, camera steady, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of an embroidery machine needle moving up and down through acid wash fabric mounted in an embroidery hoop, Indian operator's hands adjusting the fabric tension, indoor workshop lighting, white embroidery thread visible running through the needle mechanism, camera angle from side showing the needle penetrating the uneven fabric surface, vertical 9:16 frame

Medium shot of Indian worker's hands placing white tear-away stabilizer backing underneath an acid wash t-shirt on embroidery machine hoop, smoothing it carefully before starting work, workshop lighting, embroidery machine control panel visible in background, camera angle slightly elevated showing the preparation process, vertical 9:16 format, realistic textile work environment

Close-up shot of finished embroidered logo on acid wash t-shirt, Indian hands holding the completed garment up to show clean professional embroidery work without thread breaks, workshop lighting highlighting the successful result, camera slowly pulls back slightly to show full design, vertical 9:16 frame, satisfying quality finish visible

topic: DTF film ka quality matter karta hai — saste film se print kharab hoga
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a white cotton t-shirt with a cracked and peeling DTF print design on the chest area, fingers pointing to the damaged areas, warm warehouse lighting, camera slowly zooms in to show the print damage clearly, vertical 9:16 format, realistic texture of failed print visible

Medium overhead shot of a clean wooden work table surface showing two rolls of DTF transfer film side by side, one labeled with lower price tag and one with higher price tag, Indian businessman's hands reaching into frame to touch both rolls, bright indoor lighting from above, camera static, vertical 9:16 format

Extreme close-up macro shot of DTF film surface showing the difference in coating quality, camera panning slowly across the film texture to reveal uneven coating and thin release layer, studio lighting highlighting the texture details, vertical 9:16 format, realistic film material texture visible

Medium angle shot of Indian man's hands operating a DTF heat press machine, placing a DTF transfer film with printed design onto a white cotton t-shirt, pressing down the heat press, warm orange glow from the heating element, slight steam rising, camera positioned at 45-degree angle, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian businessman's hands holding a perfectly printed white cotton t-shirt with vibrant, crisp DTF print design, gently stretching the fabric to show the print flexibility and quality, natural daylight from window, camera slowly pulling back to show full t-shirt, vertical 9:16 format, print looks professional and durable

topic: Ek customer aaya 500 piece cancel karwa diya — galti uski thi ya supplier ki?
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a smartphone with a distressed expression visible through hand gestures, finger hovering over a red cancel button on screen showing order details with '500 pieces' visible, indoor office lighting with warm tungsten tone, shallow depth of field focusing on the phone screen, slight camera shake suggesting tension, wooden desk surface visible in background

Medium overhead shot of a warehouse packing table showing a large cardboard box filled with neatly folded white oversized t-shirts in clear plastic packaging, around 15-20 pieces visible, a printed invoice paper lying on top showing '500 pcs' text, hands reaching in to pick up one folded t-shirt, bright warehouse LED lighting casting soft shadows, camera slowly pushing in toward the box

Side angle shot showing Indian man's hands holding two different plain white cotton t-shirts side by side against a neutral grey wall background for size comparison, left hand holding a regular fit t-shirt appearing shorter, right hand holding an oversized t-shirt noticeably longer by 2-3 inches, natural window lighting from the side creating soft contrast, camera slowly tracking right to emphasize the length difference between both garments

Close-up overhead shot of Indian businessman's hands laying out a single white oversized t-shirt flat on a clean wooden work table, pulling out a yellow measuring tape and carefully measuring the length from shoulder seam to bottom hem, the tape showing approximately 30 inches, a notepad and pen visible at the edge of frame, warm indoor lighting, camera angle directly from above showing the full measuring process, slight zoom in on the measurement numbers

Medium shot of a clean warehouse counter desk showing a small sample package box opened with 3-4 different sized plain white t-shirts neatly folded inside with size labels visible (S, M, L, XL tags), Indian man's hands picking up one t-shirt and placing it next to a satisfied customer approval checklist on clipboard, warm natural lighting from nearby window, camera slow dolly forward suggesting positive resolution and proper process being followed

topic: Myth: Screen printing dead hai — volume orders mein sabse sasta aaj bhi
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding two identical white cotton round-neck t-shirts side by side against a neutral warehouse background, one with vibrant screen printed logo, one with DTG printed logo, slight camera push-in to emphasize comparison, warm industrial lighting, shot starts with both shirts clearly visible in frame

Medium overhead shot of a busy screen printing workshop table showing a large order of 50-60 folded plain white cotton t-shirts stacked in neat rows on brown kraft paper, with a completed printed sample t-shirt placed on top of the stack, bright overhead fluorescent lighting, static camera angle capturing the scale of volume order

Close-up tracking shot following Indian man's hand holding a calculator while writing cost breakdown numbers on a white notepad, showing calculations like 500pcs, 25rs vs 15rs per piece, red pen underlining final totals, warm desk lamp lighting from right side, shot begins with calculator and notepad both visible

Medium angle shot of screen printing carousel machine in action with rotating platforms, showing automated squeegee applying ink through mesh screen onto white cotton t-shirt, metallic industrial equipment with colored ink containers visible, bright workshop lighting, camera slowly pans right following the rotation

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding up a completed screen printed white t-shirt with crisp bold multicolor design, gently stretching the fabric to show the quality and thickness of the print, fingers running over the smooth printed surface, natural daylight from window, camera slowly pulls back to reveal full t-shirt

topic: Ek banda export karta hai humse plain leke — shipping mein kya dikkat aati hai
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a large shipping invoice document with frustrated expression visible in hand gestures, the paper shows columns and text but no readable words, placed on a wooden office desk next to a sealed cardboard export box with shipping tape, warm overhead lighting, camera slowly pushes in on the document, serious mood showing export documentation problem, vertical 9:16 format, realistic business setting

Medium shot of a clean warehouse shipping counter showing multiple stacks of folded white and colored plain cotton t-shirts neatly arranged in separate piles of approximately 50 pieces each, export quality products ready for packing, an open large corrugated cardboard box in the foreground, bright warehouse fluorescent lighting, camera slowly pans right across the stacks, professional B2B textile export environment, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands typing on a laptop keyboard, the screen shows a commercial invoice template with columns for item description, HSN code, and specifications but no readable text, a plain white cotton t-shirt lies folded next to the laptop on a wooden desk, warm indoor office lighting, camera angle from slightly above showing hands and screen, documentation process for export, vertical 9:16 format, realistic business scenario

Medium overhead shot of a warehouse packing station showing two different packaging methods side by side — left side has a small courier box with approximately 100 folded plain t-shirts and a DHL/FedEx style label, right side shows a large sea freight carton box with approximately 500 t-shirts and industrial packing tape, bright warehouse lighting, camera tilts down slowly to show the size comparison, export shipping decision visualization, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands placing a properly labeled commercial invoice on top of a sealed export carton box, the invoice shows clear columns and professional formatting with barcodes visible but no readable text, a customs clearance stamp impression is visible on the document, the box is sitting on a clean warehouse table, satisfied hand movement showing completion, bright even lighting, camera slowly pulls back, successful export preparation conclusion, vertical 9:16 format

topic: Myth: Biowash sirf softness ke liye hai — nahi aur bhi fayda hai
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding two identical white cotton round-neck t-shirts side by side against a neutral grey background, one t-shirt has a noticeably rough fuzzy surface with visible fiber pilling, the other has a smooth clean surface, hands gently rubbing both fabrics to show texture difference, bright studio lighting from above, camera slowly pushes in to show fabric detail, vertical 9:16 format, realistic workshop environment visible in soft background blur

Medium overhead shot of a clean wooden work table showing a non-biowash white cotton t-shirt lying flat, camera zooms in slowly to reveal tiny cotton fiber pills and loose threads on the fabric surface under bright LED work lamp, a magnifying glass enters frame from right side held by Indian man's hand to emphasize the rough texture, small fabric lint particles visible on the table surface around the shirt, warm indoor lighting, vertical 9:16 format

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a screen printing squeegee applying blue ink across a white t-shirt on a printing table, the ink spreads unevenly leaving patchy areas and visible streaks on the non-biowash fabric surface, camera angle is slightly tilted top-down view, bright workshop lighting, hands pause mid-stroke showing the uneven ink distribution clearly, vertical 9:16 format, realistic printing studio environment

Medium shot of a textile quality testing table showing two printed white t-shirts side by side under bright examination light, left shirt shows patchy faded print on non-biowash fabric, right shirt shows vibrant even print on biowash fabric, Indian man's hands enter frame holding a color comparison card between both prints, camera slowly dollies forward focusing on the print quality difference, vertical 9:16 format, clean professional testing environment visible in background

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands smoothly folding a perfectly printed white biowash t-shirt with sharp vibrant DTG print design, fabric has a clean smooth surface with no pilling, hands run across the print showing excellent ink absorption and color depth, warm studio lighting highlights the premium fabric quality, camera slowly pulls back to show the neatly folded shirt on a clean table, satisfying final frame, vertical 9:16 format

topic: Customer ne black tshirt pe white DTF kiya — peeling kyu hui?
prompts: Close-up shot of Indian man's hands holding a black cotton round-neck t-shirt with a large white DTF print on the chest showing visible peeling and cracking at the edges, fingers pointing to the damaged areas, warm indoor warehouse lighting, slight camera push-in movement to emphasize the peeling problem, realistic textile defect visible, vertical 9:16 format, starts with fully lit scene showing the damaged print immediately.

Medium overhead shot of a small DTF heat press machine on a clean wooden workshop table, black t-shirt placed flat on the lower platen with a white DTF transfer sheet positioned on top, machine lid open, digital temperature display visible showing 160 degrees in red LED, warm workshop lighting from above, camera static shot, realistic printing setup, vertical 9:16 format, scene starts with all elements clearly visible and well-lit from frame one.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands adjusting a digital temperature controller on a heat press machine, finger pressing the up button to increase temperature from 160 to 175 degrees shown on red LED display, black fabric visible on the press bed in background, warm industrial lighting, slight camera tilt down following the hand movement, realistic workshop equipment, vertical 9:16 format, begins with bright clear view of the temperature display being adjusted.

Medium shot of hands pressing down a heat press machine onto a black t-shirt with white DTF transfer, steam rising from the sides as pressure is applied, timer showing 12 seconds counting down on the machine display, warm workshop lighting creating slight glow around the press, camera static angle capturing the full pressing process, realistic heat press operation with visible steam effect, vertical 9:16 format, starts with press already positioned and action beginning immediately.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands peeling away the clear transfer film from a black t-shirt revealing a perfect crisp white DTF print underneath with sharp edges and smooth finish, film lifting cleanly without any adhesive residue, warm indoor lighting highlighting the quality result, slow upward camera movement following the peel, satisfying clean transfer result, vertical 9:16 format, scene opens with hands already beginning to peel the film with good lighting throughout.

topic: COD doge toh returns badhenge — prepaid model better hai
prompts: Close-up shot of a delivery person's hands holding a large brown cardboard box at a doorstep, the box being pushed back by another pair of hands in a refusing gesture, warm daylight, slight camera shake for realism, vertical 9:16 format, Indian residential area visible in soft focus background, the box has a shipping label visible on it.

Medium overhead shot of a cluttered workshop table showing a stack of about 20 folded custom-printed colorful t-shirts piled up next to a crumpled delivery receipt and a returned shipping box with tape partially torn off, fluorescent indoor lighting casting soft shadows, camera slowly zooms in on the pile, vertical 9:16 format.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands on a desk, one hand placing cash rupee notes on the left side and the other hand tapping a smartphone screen showing a green payment confirmation checkmark on the right side, split comparison feel, warm indoor office lighting, slow camera pan from left to right, vertical 9:16 format, no face visible.

Medium shot of an Indian textile warehouse office showing a small whiteboard on a wall with a simple bar graph drawn in marker showing high returns on one side and low returns on the other side, a hand with a red marker circling the low returns bar, bright tube light overhead, camera slowly pushes in toward the board, vertical 9:16 format.

Close-up shot of Indian man's hands neatly packing fresh folded plain white cotton t-shirts into a clean branded shipping box on a wooden packing table, a prepaid shipping label being smoothly placed on top of the sealed box, warm golden indoor lighting, slow satisfying camera dolly forward, organized warehouse shelves softly blurred in background, vertical 9:16 format.
